result.service_block_message: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
console_errors: [ChatAgent] selectedCustomAgent is null/undefined, skipping config fetch
Failed to execute 'postMessage' on 'DOMWindow': origin mismatch
result.notes: Genspark's own security policy blocked the request containing sensitive info (주민등록번호). This is NOT an APF warning - it's Genspark's built-in content filter. The ERR_TIMED_OUT is for Azure Application Insights telemetry, not the AI request itself. APF end_stream change (Phase3-B4) was not testable because Genspark blocked before making the AI API call.
